# Standen

> Standen builds SaaS products for founders: SaaS MVPs, product workflow automation, customer portals, product analytics dashboards and admin tools. Fixed-scope tiers: Launch (14 days, from £5,000), Scale (21 days, from £9,500) and Enterprise (30 days, from £18,000). Clients own 100% of the code, IP and deployment on handover. UK-based studio, founder-led by Tomas Jones, working remotely with clients worldwide.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.standen.io/): Services, four-stage process, fixed-scope pricing and FAQs
- [Work](https://www.standen.io/work): Case studies of delivered builds

## Case studies
- [OhMyPod](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/ohmypod): Podcast SaaS taken from idea to a live, owned product in 21 days
- [FX Quant Research Platform](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/fx-quant-research-platform): Forex research and strategy-testing platform shipped in 12 days
- [Real Estate Property Prediction App](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/real-estate-property-prediction): Full-stack property prediction, portfolio and mapping platform in 14 days
- [Scrapr.io](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/scrapr-io): Lead-generation SaaS returning 1,000+ verified leads in around 30 seconds
- [Instagram Lead Scraper](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/instagram-lead-scraper): Automated Instagram prospecting into a CRM, built in 8 days
- [Crypto News Scraper](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/crypto-news-scraper): Real-time crypto news aggregation from 50+ sources in 6 days
- [Lead Magnet Generator](https://www.standen.io/case-studies/lead-magnet-generator): AI tool for LinkedIn lead magnets with Notion sync, built in 9 days
